provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, fire magic scroll, tightly rolled aged parchment tied with a crimson silk ribbon, dark red wax seal stamped with a flame sigil, the edges of the parchment are slightly charred and browned from the magic within, warm orange-red tones on the seal and ribbon against the yellowed paper
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Flat open parchment with quill and wax seal, light background. Not a rolled scroll, not dark bg. Violates PAL-002 and item identity.
